= Scotch Gambit Accepted =

=== 8…Qa5 ===
8…Qa5 moves the queen to safety. Now White can capture the knight on e4, while Black often soon castles queenside. However, Black remains up a pawn for the moment.

[[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. Nf3/2...Nc6/3. Bc4/3...Nf6/4. d4/4...exd4/5. O-O/5...Nxe4/6. Re1/6...d5/7. Bxd5/7...Qxd5/8. Nc3/8...Qa5/9. Nxe4|Nxe4]] is the more common capture.
